package main

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"time"
)

func NewHTTPClient() *http.Client {
	return &http.Client{Timeout: 2 * time.Second}
}

func Fetch(client *http.Client, url string) error {
	req, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, url, nil)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	resp, err := client.Do(req)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer resp.Body.Close()
	_, _ = io.Copy(io.Discard, resp.Body)
	return nil
}

func Serve() error {
	server := http.Server{
		Addr:         ":8080",
		ReadTimeout:  time.Second,
		WriteTimeout: time.Second,
		IdleTimeout:  time.Second,
	}
	ctx, stop := signal.NotifyContext(context.Background(), os.Interrupt)
	defer stop()
	errCh := make(chan error, 1)
	go func() {
		errCh <- server.ListenAndServe()
	}()
	<-ctx.Done()
	return server.Shutdown(context.Background())
}

func HandleImport(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) error {
	limited := http.MaxBytesReader(w, r.Body, 1024)
	defer limited.Close()
	dec := json.NewDecoder(limited)
	var payload map[string]any
	return dec.Decode(&payload)
}

func LoadRows(db *sql.DB) error {
	rows, err := db.Query("SELECT 1")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer rows.Close()
	for rows.Next() {
	}
	return rows.Err()
}

func Process(db *sql.DB, item int) error {
	tx, err := db.Begin()
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer tx.Rollback()
	_, err = tx.Exec("UPDATE widgets SET processed = true WHERE id = ?", item)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	return tx.Commit()
}
